maml:description.maml:para: Copy a log configuration.
Copies a specific log delivery configuration to a target log source to produce a new log delivery configuration.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
A request body, either as a `PSCustomObject` or string. This parameter supports pipelining.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
Your log delivery configuration's ID.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
Your log delivery configuration's ID.
The log source's ID for log delivery.
Type of log source for which you can create a log delivery configuration, such as `cpcode-products`, `gtm-properties`, `edns-zones`, or `answerx-objects`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
A request body, either as a `PSCustomObject` or string. This parameter supports pipelining.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
Your log delivery configuration's ID.
The log source's ID for log delivery.
Type of log source for which you can create a log delivery configuration, such as `cpcode-products`, `gtm-properties`, `edns-zones`, or `answerx-objects`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Get a contact.
Lists all contacts, or retrieves details of a specific contact by its `-ContactID`.
A specific contact's ID. You need this ID when you create or modify a log delivery configuration.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
A specific contact's ID. You need this ID when you create or modify a log delivery configuration.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Get a delivery frequency.
Lists all delivery frequencies, or retrieves details of a specific frequency by its `-FrequencyID`.
Your delivery frequency's ID.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your delivery frequency's ID.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Get a log delivery threshold.
Lists all delivery thresholds, or retrieves details of a specific threshold by its `-DeliveryThresholdID`.
Your delivery threshold's ID.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your delivery threshold's ID.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Get a log configuration.
Lists all log configurations in a given `-LogSourceType` with an optional filter by `-LogSourceID`, or retrieves a specific configuration by its `-LogConfigurationID`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
Your log delivery configuration's ID.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The log source's ID for log delivery.
Type of log source for which you can create a log delivery configuration, such as `cpcode-products`, `gtm-properties`, `edns-zones`, or `answerx-objects`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
Your log delivery configuration's ID.
The log source's ID for log delivery.
Type of log source for which you can create a log delivery configuration, such as `cpcode-products`, `gtm-properties`, `edns-zones`, or `answerx-objects`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Get a log encoding.
Lists all log encodings, or retrieves a specific encoding by its `-EncodingID`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
The delivery type, either `email`, `ftp`, or `httpsns4`. The allowable encodings for log configuration are based on a chosen delivery type.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
Type of log source for which you can create a log delivery configuration, such as `cpcode-products`, `gtm-properties`, `edns-zones`, or `answerx-objects`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The encoding type's ID.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
The delivery type, either `email`, `ftp`, or `httpsns4`. The allowable encodings for log configuration are based on a chosen delivery type.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The encoding type's ID.
Type of log source for which you can create a log delivery configuration, such as `cpcode-products`, `gtm-properties`, `edns-zones`, or `answerx-objects`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Get a log format.
Lists all log formats in a given `-LogSourceType` and with an optional filter by `-LogSourceID`, or retrieves a specific log format by its `-LogFormatID`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
A log format's ID.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The log source's ID for log delivery.
Type of log source for which you can create a log delivery configuration, such as `cpcode-products`, `gtm-properties`, `edns-zones`, or `answerx-objects`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
A log format's ID.
The log source's ID for log delivery.
Type of log source for which you can create a log delivery configuration, such as `cpcode-products`, `gtm-properties`, `edns-zones`, or `answerx-objects`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Get a log redelivery.
Lists all redelivery requests, or retrieves a specific entry by its `-RedeliveryID`.
The ID for the request to resend a log.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The ID for the request to resend a log.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Get a log source.
Lists all log sources, optionally filtering by `-LogSourceType` or both `-LogSourceType` and `-LogSourceID`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The log source's ID for log delivery.
Type of log source for which you can create a log delivery configuration, such as `cpcode-products`, `gtm-properties`, `edns-zones`, or `answerx-objects`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
Type of log source for which you can create a log delivery configuration, such as `cpcode-products`, `gtm-properties`, `edns-zones`, or `answerx-objects`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The log source's ID for log delivery.
Type of log source for which you can create a log delivery configuration, such as `cpcode-products`, `gtm-properties`, `edns-zones`, or `answerx-objects`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Get a message size.
Lists all message sizes, or retrieves a specific size by its `-MessageSizeID`.
The ID for a message size. You need this ID to create or modify a log delivery configuration.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The ID for a message size. You need this ID to create or modify a log delivery configuration.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
List NetStorage groups.
Returns all NetStorage4 groups you have access to.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Create a new log configuration.
Creates new log configuration.
Type of log source for which you can create a log delivery configuration, such as `cpcode-products`, `gtm-properties`, `edns-zones`, or `answerx-objects`.
The log source's ID for log delivery.
A request body, either as a `PSCustomObject` or string. This parameter supports pipelining.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
A request body, either as a `PSCustomObject` or string. This parameter supports pipelining.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The log source's ID for log delivery.
Type of log source for which you can create a log delivery configuration, such as `cpcode-products`, `gtm-properties`, `edns-zones`, or `answerx-objects`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Create a new log redelivery.
Creates a new request to resend a log.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
The first hour of time range (0-23) for which log redelivery is requested.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The last hour of time range (1-24) for which log redelivery is requested.
Your log delivery configuration's ID.
The date from which log redelivery is requested.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
A request body, either as a `PSCustomObject` or string. This parameter supports pipelining.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
The first hour of time range (0-23) for which log redelivery is requested.
A request body, either as a `PSCustomObject` or string. This parameter supports pipelining.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The last hour of time range (1-24) for which log redelivery is requested.
Your log delivery configuration's ID.
The date from which log redelivery is requested.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Remove a log configuration.
Deletes a specific log delivery configuration.
Your log delivery configuration's ID.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
Your log delivery configuration's ID.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Resume a log configuration.
Resumes log delivery for a specific configuration.
Your log delivery configuration's ID.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
Your log delivery configuration's ID.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Update a log configuration.
Modifies a specific log delivery. You need to specify all the data members in the request; otherwise, the missing members are removed from the configuration.
Your log delivery configuration's ID.
A request body, either as a `PSCustomObject` or string. This parameter supports pipelining.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
A request body, either as a `PSCustomObject` or string. This parameter supports pipelining.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
Your log delivery configuration's ID.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
Suspend a log configuration.
Suspends log delivery for a specific configuration. You will not receive logs for this configuration while it is suspended.
Your log delivery configuration's ID.
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).

An account credential key that lets you move between accounts when using an API client enabled for multiple accounts. To find account switch keys, use [Get-AccountSwitchKey](https://techdocs.akamai.com/powershell/docs/get-accountswitchkey).
Your EdgeGrid resource file to authenticate your command. Defaults to `~/.edgerc`.
Your log delivery configuration's ID.
The section name in your EdgeGrid resource file to retrieve authentication credentials from. Defaults to `default`.
